texto: I know my rightful place as a child of God
autor: I am blessed and highly favoured.I am protected and delivered from every evil.I am redeem and set free from all bondages in Jesus Name.
explicacao: Citação de I am blessed and highly favoured.I am protected and delivered from every evil.I am redeem and set free from all bondages in Jesus Name. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I know my rightful place as a child of God” articula reflexao, lailah-gifty-akita, think-great-be-great em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como think-great-be-great.
